title: CompositionLayer
description: A rendering group that groups child wireframes and child layers. Does not draw pixels itself. Ordered rendering modifiers and compositing are applied to its composed output.

id.description: Stable layer identifier, persistent throughout the view lifetime.

x.description: The position in pixels on the X axis of the layer in absolute coordinates. Uses the same coordinate space as mobile wireframes.

y.description: The position in pixels on the Y axis of the layer in absolute coordinates. Uses the same coordinate space as mobile wireframes.

width.description: The width in pixels of the layer. Uses the same coordinate space as mobile wireframes.

height.description: The height in pixels of the layer. Uses the same coordinate space as mobile wireframes.

children.description: Ordered back-to-front references to child wireframes or child layers.

modifiers.description: Ordered list of rendering modifiers applied to the composed layer output in array order.

compositeOperation.description: Operation used when compositing the rendered group into its parent.
